locality.name: Philadelphia
locality.assessment_context: Philadelphia conducts annual reassessments through the Office of Property Assessment (OPA). The city reassessed all properties in 2023 for the first time in a decade, so median ratios should be close to 1.0. Philadelphia uses a category_code system rather than a single class field: category 1 = residential, 2 = hotels/apartments, 3 = store with dwelling, 4 = commercial, 5 = industrial, 6 = vacant land. Note: the OPA dataset is a flat file with point geometry (parcel centroids, not polygons), so geometric area variables will not be available.
